summary: Iteration 27 - Backend + frontend testing of new BranchDetailPage drill-in. Backend: 10/10 pytest passing - GET /api/v3/branch-mgmt/{id}/detail returns the full payload (branch, admin_user [password redacted], staff.{branch_admins/head_physios/physios/doctors}, performance.{kpis, appointments[list,total,completed,scheduled,cancelled], consultations[list,total_count,total_amount], packages[list,total_count,total_amount], follow_ups[list,open,done,total]}, head_physio_section.{calendars, physio_calendars, post_treatment_reviews}). Role gating verified: super_admin + business_dev allowed, pre_sales/branch_admin/physio all return 403. 404 returned on bogus branch_id. Math sanity: follow_ups.open + follow_ups.done == follow_ups.total. PUT /api/v3/branches/{id} accepts new fields opened_date='2026-01-15' and opening_hours='Mon-Sat 7am-9pm', V3BranchOut returns them, and they are persisted (verified via re-fetch through /detail). Frontend: super-admin login -> Branch Management tab -> clicked 'bm-branch-open-*' inside Velachery branch card -> BranchDetailPage rendered (branch-detail-page testid present). Verified back/refresh/edit buttons + all 4 tabs (summary/staff/performance/head_physio) + summary cards (branch-summary-card, branch-admin-card) + staff toggle cards x4 + performance KPI tab + 4 perf sub-tabs (appointments/consultations/packages/followups) each rendering its own card+ListTable + head physio section (3 cards: calendars, physio_cal, post-treatment). Edit dialog opened, filled opened_date and opening_hours, submitted, navigated to Summary tab and confirmed BOTH values render. Back button returned to grid with 4 cards intact. stopPropagation verified: clicking bm-branch-edit-* opens the BranchFormDialog WITHOUT drilling into the detail page; clicking bm-branch-reassign-* opens the Reassign dialog WITHOUT drilling in. PerformanceTab View (bm-perf-view-*) also drills into the same BranchDetailPage. Regression nav: master/marketing/branches tabs OK.

issues: The branch card's outer click handler drills in, but the inner BRANCH ADMIN block has e.stopPropagation, so a Playwright .click() that lands at the center of the card (which falls onto the admin block) silently does NOT drill in. Real users can still drill via the explicit 'Open Branch Details →' button (bm-branch-open-*) or by clicking the card header/KPI/footer areas. Consider tightening the stopPropagation to only the specific reassign-link button rather than the whole admin block, OR removing the card-level onClick and keeping only the explicit Open button + Open Branch Details link, OR adding a cursor-pointer affordance only to the safe areas. Not blocking.
(Carry-over from iter 21-26) Hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' still emitted on first render. Located in CRMPage line ~828. Unrelated to Branch Detail page.

action_items: (Minor) BranchManagementBoard card click drill-in: tighten the e.stopPropagation scope so card-center clicks still drill in (currently the BRANCH ADMIN block stops propagation across the whole admin section). Real users can still use the explicit 'Open Branch Details' button — but better UX to have the entire non-button card surface clickable.
(Carry-over) Remove <span> wrapper inside <option> in CRMPage Branch Booking select.
critical_code_review_comments: v3_branch_mgmt.branch_detail does NOT cap leads list, appointments list etc. before slicing -- when a branch has 1000+ leads/appointments the entire collection is pulled into memory before slicing to [:50]/[:100]. Add Mongo-level sort+limit or aggregation $facet to avoid OOM at scale.
v3_branch_mgmt.branch_detail aggregates follow_ups across all leads by Python loop (O(N leads x M follow_ups)). For high-volume branches consider $unwind on the leads collection.

BranchDetailPage.jsx uses `slice(0, 25)` for post_treatment_reviews and `slice(0, 50)` server-side -- numbers don't match. Either align server cap with client cap or surface a 'View all' link. Currently a branch with 60 reviews shows 25 with no indication that more exist on the server.

BranchDetailPage admin avatar initials computation: `(b.admin_name || "?").split(" ").map((w) => w[0]).slice(0, 2).join("")` will throw if admin_name has a leading space (w[0] undefined). Guard with `.filter(Boolean)` or `(w?.[0] || "")`.

BranchDetailPage EditMetaDialog calls updateBranch with the full form including admin_phone, vertical, branch_name, address even if the user only intended to update opened_date/opening_hours. That works but it means non-empty defaults get pushed back on every save. Consider sending only dirty fields, or at least normalizing empty strings to null on the client.
BranchDetailPage Summary card row 'Created' uses (b.created_at || '').slice(0, 10) — if created_at is missing the row still renders as empty string. Use '—' fallback for consistency.

BranchManagementBoard card click handler relies on stopPropagation inside admin block which is a common source of bugs (Playwright .click() at element center can land on the stopPropagated child). Recommend wrapping ONLY the inline button (Reassign Manager →) with stopPropagation, not the entire admin block.

success_rate.frontend: ~100% - drill-in works via bm-branch-open-* and via PerformanceTab bm-perf-view-*, all 4 tabs render their cards, all 4 perf sub-tabs render, edit dialog persists opened_date + opening_hours and they reappear in Summary tab, back returns to grid, stopPropagation correctly isolates edit/reassign buttons from card drill-in.

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md - super_admin admin@fitsiomax.com/admin123, presales@fitsiomax.com/presales123, branchadmin@fitsiomax.com/branch123, physio@fitsiomax.com/physio123, businessdev@fitsiomax.com/bd123. Auth login returns key 'token'.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created in this iteration. The persistence test mutated Velachery Fitsiomax branch with opened_date='2026-01-15' and opening_hours='Mon-Sat 7am-9pm' - these values are now live in the DB for that branch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch Detail page is live and fully wired. Backend route: GET /api/v3/branch-mgmt/{id}/detail (super_admin + business_dev + marketing_head only). Frontend testids: branch-detail-page, branch-detail-back, branch-detail-refresh, branch-detail-edit, branch-detail-tab-{summary,staff,performance,head_physio}, branch-summary-card, branch-admin-card, branch-staff-{branch_admins,head_physios,physios,doctors}-card, branch-staff-row-*, branch-performance-tab, branch-perf-sub-{appointments,consultations,packages,followups}, branch-perf-{appointments,consultations,packages,followups} (the card itself), branch-perf-{appt,cons,pkg,fu}-table, branch-hp-{calendars,physio-cal,post-treatment}, branch-hp-cal-*, branch-hp-pcal-*, branch-hp-review-*, branch-edit-meta-dialog, branch-edit-{name,address,opened,hours,phone,vertical,cancel,submit}. Drill-in is triggered from BranchManagementBoard via clicking the card (outer area) OR the explicit 'bm-branch-open-*' link OR from the Performance sub-tab via 'bm-perf-view-*'. Edit/Delete/Reassign buttons on the card properly stopPropagation. V3BranchOut now exposes opened_date and opening_hours (optional strings, default '').
rca of the issue: No product bug. Backend test suite for /detail endpoint and extended PUT /branches/{id} = 10/10 passing. Frontend drill-in works end-to-end. Only minor UX nit: clicking the dead-center of a branch card (which falls inside the admin block's e.stopPropagation zone) silently does not drill in - users have to click outside that block or use the explicit Open button. Both work but the implicit one is brittle. Recommend the main agent narrow the stopPropagation in BranchManagementBoard.jsx line ~100 to wrap only the Reassign Manager link instead of the whole admin block.
